title: Stripe rolls out tools to help UK businesses sell globally and build for the AI economy
description: Stripe today shared new tools to help UK businesses sell globally and seize the AI commerce opportunity, from expanded multi-currency treasury capabilities to new fraud defences, and the ability for UK businesses to sell across multiple AI agents through a single integration.

title: 3 Nuclear Energy Stocks Powering the AI Boom in June
description: AI hyperscaler CapEx spending is now the single biggest variable in the U.S. power equation. Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT), Meta (NASDAQ:META), Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) and Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL) are collectively guiding to $710B+ in combined 2026 CapEx, and the EIA’s Annual Energy Outlook 2026 now models data center server electricity use growing to 818 billion kilowatthours in 2050, more ... 3 Nuclear Energy Stocks Powering the AI Boom in June
